Astronaut demo trains hands, not fate

Use demo for UI fluency and pacing — not as proof of future wins.

Play Astronaut Claim bonus

Skills demo actually improves

Button placement, multiplier acceleration cues, animation distraction, and personal fatigue curves — all visible before you fund.

What demo cannot teach

Real loss aversion, withdrawal friction, bonus wagering pressure, and the urge to chase after a public bad beat.

A clean graduation path

After dozens of deliberate practice rounds, fund minimally, keep a hard stop, and read strategy before scaling.

Frequently asked questions
